name: code-forge
description: Code Forge v0.2.0 (Option D) — multi-agent build system driven by recursive /goal sessions. An outer claude -p /goal orchestrator dispatches one claude -p /goal per cycle; each cycle child runs best-of-N implementer workers (default 6) and configurable dimensional reviewers (count + model + dimensions picked in spec.md). One hook survives — test files are read-only during green phase.
